name: Ask Sales V4 fresh authoritative Slack source-gold evaluation - 2026-07-22
purpose: Fresh, redacted, source-backed generalization evaluation. These prompts must never become routing rules, synonyms, hard-coded answers, or question-specific patches.

adjudication.methodology: Questions were redacted and decomposed into atomic needs from read-only Slack threads before either candidate was run. Only replies from Sales Ops, the Head of Sales, Sales Ops and Training, or a directly confirmed operating owner were treated as answer evidence. Ambiguous, tentative, live, artifact, and compliance-conflicted details were labeled for precise routing instead of being forced into direct answers. V3 and V4 outputs were not used as answer authority.

prompts.question: A prospect asks whether we offer casting for reality TV programs. Do we offer reality TV, or only documentary-style shows?

goldNeeds.text: State whether the company offers reality-TV casting opportunities or documentary-style programming only.
goldContext: Sales Ops confirmed on 2026-07-22 that the company does not offer reality TV and offers documentary-style programming only.

prompts.question: Can I describe a previously signed cast member's situation to a prospect without naming them, and can I share that cast member's contact details?

goldNeeds.text: Determine whether a rep may describe a signed cast member's situation without identifying the person.
goldContext: Sales Ops confirmed that discussing the situation without naming the cast member is allowed.

goldNeeds.text: State whether the cast member's personal contact information may be shared for calls or texts.
goldContext: Sales Ops explicitly prohibited giving out cast members' personal contact information for calls or texts.

conversations.title: Daymond John access and collaboration boundaries

prompts.question: Can a Next Level CEO cast member fly to Miami at a different time from their own filming just to meet Daymond John while he records their introduction?

goldNeeds.text: Determine whether a separate Miami visit to meet Daymond while he records the introduction is offered.
goldContext: Sales Ops confirmed that a separate visit to meet Daymond at another filming time is not currently offered.

prompts.question: Can Daymond John's team collaborate with that cast member on a social-media post?

goldNeeds.text: Determine whether Daymond John's team will collaborate with the cast member on a social-media post.
goldContext: Sales Ops answered no to the follow-up asking whether Daymond John's team would collaborate on a social-media post.

prompts.question: The contract asks clients to cooperate with promotional activities. What should they do with the social assets provided after onboarding?

goldNeeds.text: Explain the approved use of the social assets supplied in the onboarding email.
goldContext: Sales Ops said clients are encouraged to post the supplied social assets to announce their feature, build awareness, and direct their audience to the episode.

conversations.title: Call 1 while prospect is a passenger

prompts.question: A prospect says they will join Call 1 while riding as a passenger in a car. Should I take the call or reschedule it?

goldNeeds.text: State whether Call 1 should proceed while the prospect is a passenger or be rescheduled.
goldContext: Sales Ops instructed the rep to reschedule the Call 1.

prompts.question: The same prospect is booked twice under different reps. I need the duplicate records combined and the later appointment replaced. Where should this be handled?

goldNeeds.text: Route duplicate-record merging and appointment replacement to the current sales-tech channel without inventing backend steps.
blockedContext: Sales Ops instructed the rep to repost this duplicate-lead and appointment-repair request in the tech channel; the rep should not merge records from a chatbot answer.

conversations.title: VIP upgrade and unlisted payment terms

prompts.question: A client wants to upgrade to VIP using a six-month payment plan that would require changing the contract. What process and contract boundary should I follow?

goldNeeds.text: Direct the rep to use the current upgrade form for the upgrade details.
goldContext: Sales Ops asked the rep to use the new upgrade form before processing the upgrade.

goldNeeds.text: State that contracts and terms are not edited for an unlisted plan and the client must use an offered option.
goldContext: Sales Ops confirmed that contracts or terms will not be edited and the client must choose an offered payment option.

conversations.title: Phone payment and onboarding with Zoom recording

prompts.question: If a client has no usable internet, can I collect payment and complete onboarding by phone, and how should the call be recorded?

goldNeeds.text: State the company recording boundary for a payment and onboarding call when the client cannot join normally.
goldContext: Sales Ops said to keep the interaction on Zoom video if possible because company policy requires it.

goldNeeds.text: Explain the approved workaround of keeping Zoom running on the computer while calling the client by phone so the call remains captured.
goldContext: Sales Ops approved the experienced closer's suggestion to keep Zoom running on the computer and call the client by phone so Zoom captures the conversation.

conversations.title: HubSpot owner with no Keap appointment

prompts.question: A lead has an owner in HubSpot but no appointment in Keap. How do I check whether another rep already contacted or auditioned them?

goldNeeds.text: Give the first approved check for prior rep contact when HubSpot has an owner but Keap has no appointment.
goldContext: Sales Ops said to check Keap notes and, if notes exist, contact the rep who wrote them.

goldNeeds.text: Explain the fallback when Keap notes do not show prior contact.
goldContext: Sales Ops said that if no useful note exists, call the applicant and ask whether anyone from ISTV contacted them or conducted an audition.

conversations.title: Main ISTV missed cohort payment deadline

prompts.question: A main ISTV prospect could not complete payment by the cohort deadline because the bank was closed, but says they can pay Monday. Is there an exception, or must they wait?

goldNeeds.text: Determine whether a closed bank creates an exception to the main ISTV cohort payment deadline.
goldContext: Sales Ops gave no exception for the missed main ISTV payment deadline in this bank-closure scenario.

goldNeeds.text: State the waiting period given by Sales Ops after this missed main ISTV deadline.
goldContext: Sales Ops said the prospect has to wait six months.

prompts.question: If a lead cancels before Call 1, may I follow up to ask why? If they cancel before Call 2 after opting out of texts, may I email them to reschedule?
prompts.sourceAuthority: Sales Ops with a compliance conflict preserved

goldNeeds.text: Explain the approved follow-up expectation for an ordinary cancellation or no-show when the person has not opted out or asked for no contact.
goldContext: Sales Ops said reps may try to follow up and that two follow-up calls are expected for a no-show, provided the person has not asked not to be contacted.

goldNeeds.text: Determine whether an opt-out from texts still permits a new email or call for rescheduling.
blockedContext: The Slack reply allowed ordinary follow-up absent a do-not-contact request, while the governed DNC article treats STOP or opt-out conservatively across outreach. The exact cross-channel effect of a text opt-out must be verified before contacting the person again.

prompts.question: Where can I find the current upgrade sheet and how do I identify the right form?

goldNeeds.text: Give the source-approved discovery instruction for finding the upgrade form in Slack.
goldContext: Sales Ops instructed the rep to search the word upgrade in Slack.

goldNeeds.text: Provide or verify the exact current upgrade form rather than inventing a link or relying on an unavailable screenshot.
blockedContext: The authoritative reply identified the form with a Slack image, but the governed chatbot corpus does not contain a verified current artifact link or the image needed to identify it exactly.
